    D

    databaseHelper - Static variable in class logic.StatusData
     
    DatabaseHelper - Class in databasePart1
    The DatabaseHelper class is responsible for managing the connection to the database, performing operations such as user registration, login validation, and handling invitation codes.
    DatabaseHelper() - Constructor for class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    It is a constructor.
    DatabaseHelper(Connection) - Constructor for class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
     
    databasePart1 - package databasePart1
    Contains the database access layer for the Student QA application.
    delete(int, int, User) - Method in class model.Questions
     
    delete(int, User) - Method in class model.Answers
    Delete
    delete(int, User) - Method in class model.Reviews
    Delete a review if the user is either the author or privileged.

    Delete a notification by ID.

    Delete question

    Delete review

    Delete reviewer request
    deleteUserRole(String, User.Role) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
